seoTitle: Lucas vs Lucknow — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lucas and Lucknow. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lucas and Lucknow.
heading: Lucas vs Lucknow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lucas, Victoria and Lucknow, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lucknow has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Lucas (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lucas or Lucknow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lucas has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Lucknow scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lucas scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Lucknow scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lucas or Lucknow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lucknow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
